title: Sum of Two Integers
problem_statement: Calculate the sum of two integers without using the + or - operators.
intuition: Use XOR for partial sums and AND shifted left for carries until no carry remains.

approaches.name: Bitwise addition loop
approaches.description: Compute the sum without carry using XOR, compute carry using AND, then repeat with carry shifted left.
approaches.why_not: Using arithmetic operators violates the problem constraints.

interview_qa.q: What does XOR compute when adding bits?
interview_qa.a: It computes the sum bit without carry.
Carry is the AND of the bits, shifted left one position.
